Portfolio · Anderson Serangoon JC · 2026

Cheong En Yu
Ian

My name is Ian, and I created this portfolio to document my learning journey and reflect on my future aspirations. Through my research and experiences, I have developed a deep interest in the integration of business, technology, and engineering. As a two-time Volleyball Captain in both Secondary School and Junior College, I am grateful to my coaches and teachers for their mentorship. Beyond sportsmanship, the values of resilience and teamwork I gained on the court have been instrumental to my academic success. Ultimately, I believe leadership is most meaningful when driven by a heart for the community and a commitment to serving others.
